examples: Premonitions of future undreamt-of happiness made her heart beat.
Many Chinese enjoy a prosperity undreamt of by their forefathers.
Something undreamt of was lurking everywhere and the uppermost question every day was: when, Oh! When would we come across it?
Radio frequency identification and tracking technology were undreamt of just a few years ago.
The two-party system was undreamt of by the founders of the Republic.
